reviews.comment:
Buenísimo tiene baños muy limpios y el servicio es bastante rápido la recomiendo por si tienen urgencia de ir al baño si de echar nafta a la vez

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! The restrooms are very clean and the service is quite fast. I recommend it if you urgently need to use the restroom or fill up your tank at the same time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQN2N2SzJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente como todas las estaciones de servicio del ACA.
Los playeros de primera, con descuento para socios en combustibles.
Baños limpios y todo funciona bien.
Full muy amplio y concurrido, con distintas alternativas para sentarte.
Lavacoches a maquina, casi siempre hay algo de espera, con descuento para socios.
Servicio de cambio de aceite.
Local de ventas de accesorios y remplazos para auto y oficina de trámites para socios.
Taller de mecánica ligera y gomeria para socios.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, like all ACA service stations.
The attendants are top-notch, with member discounts on fuel.
The restrooms are clean and everything works well. The full service area is very spacious and busy, with various seating options. There's a car wash (almost always a bit of a wait), with a member discount. Oil change service is available. There's a shop selling auto parts and accessories, and an office for member services. A light mechanical repair shop and tire shop are also available for members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRZ0sybmNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Antes cuando llenabas el tanque te limpiaban los vidrios, y controlaban agua y aceite. Ahora nada de eso. El servicio cayó mucho. Los baños sucios también.

(Translated by Google)
Before, when you filled up your tank, they'd clean the windshield and check the water and oil levels. Now, none of that. The service has gone downhill. The bathrooms are dirty too.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQeXZxUE1REAE

reviews.comment:
Mucha fila para cargar nafta, una lástima que siendo un estación de servicio tan grande y con tantos surtidores, solo use 1 y haya q esperar tanto haciendo fila. Trataré de evitar cargar en esta estación. 3/10

(Translated by Google)
Long lines to get gas. It's a shame that such a large station with so many pumps only used one and had to wait so long. I'll try to avoid this station. 3/10
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQMGVHUDVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fuimos a retirar un auto que tuvo que ser arreglado. No mio, de manera que lo único que puedo decir es que es muy atenta la atención de la  gente demesa de entradas.

(Translated by Google)
We went to pick up a car that needed repairs. Not mine, so all I can say is that the staff at the front desk were very attentive.
